arts.ttl: Bolton vs Plymouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Bolton Wanderers and Plymouth Argyle, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle in with a ‘strong chance’ of securing new signing before Bolton Wanderers test
arts.sum: Tom Cleverley has revealed that Plymouth Argyle are close to signing a new centre-back on loan before they face Bolton Wanderers. The post Plymouth Argyle in with a ‘strong chance’ of securing new signing before Bolton Wanderers test appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
